decision: Self domain: design the convergent center of the ontology

steps.action: Self domain: design the convergent center of the ontology
steps.notes: Self ontology page deployed — views/ontology-views/self.ejs, handler wired, navbar linked. Live at /ontology/self.

Architecture review passed. View clean, handler wired correctly, graph URIs use localhost:3000 prefix, SPARQL covers stories/values/practices/people. Minor: some stats hardcoded in view rather than from query — acceptable for v1.
